title: AppFactory App Suggestion
description: Schema for human-submitted app ideas in suggestions/

idea.description: Short name or title for the app idea

pain_point.description: The specific user pain point this app would solve

target_audience.description: Who would use this app (specific persona, not generic)

priority.description: normal: enters queue. high: moved to front of queue. rush: starts immediately, even if it means queuing another project.

notes.description: Additional context, competitor references, or feature ideas
